## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion on content strategy and SEO optimization for Diligent, focusing on improving organic traffic and addressing current challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Diligent's organic search traffic is down 20% YoY, despite producing new content and running awareness campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Current content creation process is reactive and lacks a systematic approach to SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes a structured content strategy to scale production and learn faster from content performance](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [Technical limitations in Diligent's CMS and ongoing web redesign project may impact content publishing velocity](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Performance and Challenges

  - [Organic search traffic down 20% year-over-year](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [$100,000 spent on awareness campaign with little lasting traffic impact](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Shifting focus between governance, ESG, risk, and compliance has led to inconsistent SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Current content creation is reactive, lacking an editorial calendar or consistent output targets](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)

### Content Types and SEO Optimization

  - [SEO-focused content: Hub and spoke model, driving traffic and keyword ranking](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Editorial blogs: Thought leadership, minimal SEO work](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Product/announcement blogs: Minimal to no SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Gated content (videos, podcasts, guides, case studies): Focus on lead capture, landing pages lack SEO juice](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Approach

  - [Systematic "seed planting" strategy: Refreshing existing content and creating new pieces](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Goal: 5-10 new content pieces weekly to accelerate learning and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Tailored voice and style guide to maintain consistency](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Assigned managing editor and director to ensure focus and avoid conflicts of interest](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)

### Implementation Challenges and Considerations

  - [Diligent's CMS limitations hinder rapid content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [Ongoing web redesign project (until end of December) may impact content strategy execution](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Resources section redesign planned for Q3](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Need to bridge the gap between content creation and technical limitations](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)

### Priorities and Next Steps

  - [Focus on web and organic traffic improvement as top priority](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [Structure SOW to demonstrate clear value and facilitate future change orders](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [Start with a focused approach for the next three months to show results before scaling](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [Address product and solution pages, which have seen a 20% drop in organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to revise SOW based on discussion and send follow-up within a few hours](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [Schedule touch-base meeting for Monday to finalize procurement process](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [Develop a plan to bridge content creation and technical limitations during web redesign](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [Focus on improving product and solution pages as part of initial strategy](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
  - [Establish clear metrics and goals for the first three months to demonstrate value and justify scaling](https://fathom.video/share/fg_rzxwWrNsGtzQvFjTuxzwXUF-zUAgW?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
